testcase.name: test_generate_passport_no_verifications_returns_400
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_four_phases.py:155: in test_generate_passport_no_verifications_returns_400 assert response.status_code == 400, f"Expected 400, got {response.status_code}: {response.text}" E AssertionError: Expected 400, got 422: {"detail":[{"type":"missing","loc":["body","session_id"],"msg":"Field required","input":null,"url":"https://errors.pydantic.dev/2.12/v/missing"}]} E assert 422 == 400 E + where 422 = <Response [422]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_create_test_transaction
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_four_phases.py:190: in test_create_test_transaction assert response.status_code in [200, 201], f"Create transaction failed: {response.text}" E AssertionError: Create transaction failed: {"detail":[{"type":"missing","loc":["body","description"],"msg":"Field required","input":{"name":"TEST_Conductor_Transaction","transaction_type":"real_estate_purchase","participants":[]},"url":"https://errors.pydantic.dev/2.12/v/missing"},{"type":"enum","loc":["body","transaction_type"],"msg":"Input should be 'real_estate_closing', 'business_contract', 'estate_settlement', 'trust_settlement', 'merger_acquisition', 'loan_closing' or 'custom'","input":"real_estate_purchase","ctx":{"expected":"'real_estate_closing', 'business_contract', 'estate_settlement', 'trust_settlement', 'merger_acquisition', 'loan_closing' or 'custom'"},"url":"https://errors.pydantic.dev/2.12/v/enum"}]} E assert 422 in [200, 201] E + where 422 = <Response [422]>.status_code
